2026-06-12GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityCanada-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership AgreementOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Canada-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement done at Ottawa on 24 September 2025.N/A
subject: Canada-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Canada-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement done at Ottawa on 24 September 2025.
